ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the technology used by the asset */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the asset is located */,
  "installation_year" INTEGER /* Year the asset was installed */,
  "current_capacity" REAL /* Current operational capacity of the asset in MW */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was commissioned */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset is scheduled for decommission (if applicable) */,
  "primary_fuel_type" TEXT /* Primary fuel type used by the asset */,
  "secondary_fuel_type" TEXT /* Secondary fuel type used by the asset (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_technology_id FOREIGN KEY ("technology_id") REFERENCES technologies ("technology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology (e.g., Gas Supply) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "efficiency_rate" REAL /* Efficiency rate of the technology (as a decimal value) */,
  "emission_rate" REAL /* Emission rate of the technology (in tons of CO2 per MW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Region 1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region (e.g., temperate, tropical) */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body overseeing the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity_planning" (
  "planning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity planning entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being planned for capacity changes */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the planned capacity is targeted */,
  "planned_capacity" REAL /* Planned capacity for the asset in MW */,
  "planned_outage" REAL /* Planned outage time for the asset in hours */,
  "planned_maintenance" REAL /* Planned maintenance time for the asset in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_planning_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset whose status is being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the asset (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the asset status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_status_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., operations, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset affected by the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the asset */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset that depends on another asset */,
  "dependent_asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., physical, logical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_dependencies_dependent_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_dependencies_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset associated with the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., manual, specification) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* Binary file containing the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_documents_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)
